prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CHISELSET-8PC-UT Product Type: CHISEL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 8pc Carbon Steel Tipped Wood and Clay Carving Hobby Tool Chisel Set Description: This 8pc Wood Carving Chisel set includes all the important tools you need to finish your home project with the details that it deserves.

These are semi-polished, heat treated steel precision ground chisel blades. They have chrome plated steel ferrules that protect handles from splitting. The chisel blades have an overall length of 5-1/2in, featuring comfortable and stylish wood handles.

The set comes with all of the wood carving supplies you need for hard and soft wood carving arts and crafts projects. Search Terms: wood working carving tools kit set Features: - ESSENTIAL WOODWORKING TOOL - Kick up some sawdust and get to work on that project in your shop or workbench with this professional wood carving chisel tool set - STEEL TIPPED CHISELS - Made for durability and precision with high carbon steel, these blades will allow you to craft like a pro with Wood, Clay, Wax, and more. - 8 BLADE SET FOR VERSATILITY - This 8pc set includes three Skew Chisels (5/64in 3/16in 1/4in) Two Straight Chisels (1/4in and 13/32in), one V-Parting Chisel (1/4in), and two Gouge Chisels - WOOD HANDLE FINISH - Crafted for comfort, grip, and style wood finish accomplishes all three. - CRAFT AND HOBBY TOOL READY - No crafting, woodworking, or hobby toolbox is complete without this 8pc Chisel Set === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
